title: Jiami.in
description: A full-featured eCommerce website currently under active development. Jiami.in is being built with a dynamic product catalogue, user authentication, cart & checkout flow, and payment gateway integration for a seamless online shopping experience.

title: AFMT India
description: Corporate web application developed for AFMT India, providing business information, service listings, and client-facing features with a clean and professional interface.

title: Khemandas ERP
description: An enterprise resource planning solution for Khemandas, built to centralize business operations, manage inventory, orders, and cross-department workflows on a scalable PHP architecture.

title: Tucana Lights
description: eCommerce platform for Tucana Lights featuring dynamic product listings, admin panel management, order processing, and an intuitive storefront for lighting products.

title: Ledex – Jasper Tech Labs
description: A user profile and business management web application developed under Jasper Tech Labs, providing streamlined account management and operational tools.

title: PKnit – Jasper Tech Labs
description: A live web application built for the textile/knitting industry under Jasper Tech Labs, managing product data, business processes, and client interactions.

title: TINT CRM
description: A comprehensive CRM managing employee and business activities across four integrated companies. Features multi-company mapping, role-based permissions, leave & expense management, invoice management, and IndiaMART API integration.

title: Auctionwale
description: A platform to simplify and manage property listings and auctions. Includes master management module, property section with Excel upload support, dynamic frontend listings, and Razorpay payment gateway integration.

title: Pamcal CRM
description: A dynamic case management system with configurable master module, bulk case uploads, incentive tracking aligned with employee performance, and dedicated APIs for mobile app integration.

title: Heritage Synergy Smart Suite ERP
description: A powerful CRM and ERP solution centralizing business operations. Manages projects, leads, enquiries, and channel partner information with scalable architecture for cross-department collaboration.

title: Manekratna – Jewellery eCommerce
description: An end-to-end eCommerce platform for artificial jewellery with dynamic frontend, robust admin panel, product/customer management, catalogue handling, order & invoice generation, and payment gateway integration.

title: Campistaan
description: A camping experience management platform for tent bookings by location. Features order processing, payment gateway integration, and manual cash entry support for offline bookings.

title: IIFJAS – Fashion Jewellery Show
description: India International Fashion Jewellery & Accessories Show platform built with CodeIgniter 4 for event and exhibitor management.

title: Met and HTS
description: A Laravel-based web application developed for Met and HTS, providing business management and operational features.

title: Logisync CRM
description: An advanced logistics CRM built in Laravel for FEC Logisync, integrating multiple government and enterprise APIs to automate and streamline end-to-end logistics operations. Implements ULIP (Unified Logistics Interface Platform) APIs for real-time GST verification, container tracking details, and IGM (Import General Manifest) data retrieval. Integrates DigiLocker API via ULIP for Aadhaar-based identity verification and PAN card data validation for KYC compliance. Connects with Tally API for automated ledger entries, financial data sync, and accounting workflows. Features Laravel Cron Jobs and Task Schedulers for automated data fetching, report generation, and background processing. Also includes client management, shipment tracking, role-based access control, and a comprehensive operations dashboard.
